# Third-Party Dependencies

This directory should contain the following repositories (clone them before running):

| Directory | Repository | Branch |
|-----------|-----------|--------|
| `MMDuet2/` | https://github.com/yellow-binary-tree/MMDuet2 | main |
| `VideoLLaMA2/` | https://github.com/DAMO-NLP-SG/VideoLLaMA2 | audio_visual |
| `video-SALMONN-2/` | https://github.com/bytedance/video-SALMONN-2 | main |

## Setup

```bash
cd third_party
git clone https://github.com/yellow-binary-tree/MMDuet2.git
git clone -b audio_visual https://github.com/DAMO-NLP-SG/VideoLLaMA2.git
git clone https://github.com/bytedance/video-SALMONN-2.git
```
